calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Answer
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Amended Answer.

Defendant's motion for leave to file an amended answer is GRANTED. Courts exercise great liberality in allowing amendments to the answer. (Husley v. Koehler (1990) 218 Cal.App.3d 1150, 1159.) The delay in filing this motion is not prejudicial since the trial date is still months away. The parties have time to conduct additional discovery, if necessary. The reply cures any noncompliance with CRC 3.1324.

Defendant must file its amended answer within 10 days of this order.

order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JMQ)
